mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material (material_id, title, subject_preset, original_file_name, content_type, storage_path, status, chunk_count, error_message, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.materialId}, #{po.title}, #{po.subjectPreset}, #{po.originalFileName}, #{po.contentType}, #{po.storagePath}, #{po.status}, #{po.chunkCount}, #{po.errorMessage}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), subject_preset = VALUES(subject_preset), original_file_name = VALUES(original_file_name), content_type = VALUES(content_type), storage_path = VALUES(storage_path), status = VALUES(status), chunk_count = VALUES(chunk_count), error_message = VALUES(error_message), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_chunk (chunk_id, material_id, chapter_id, chapter_title, chunk_index, page_no, source_label, text, keywords_json, created_at) VALUES (#{po.chunkId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.chapterId}, #{po.chapterTitle}, #{po.chunkIndex}, #{po.pageNo}, #{po.sourceLabel}, #{po.text}, #{po.keywordsJson}, #{po.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material_chunk WHERE material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
